calendar.matters:
Petition For Instructions To Trustee And Approval Of Gift To Grantor'S Issue (Probate Code Section 1
Off Calendar Dec-28-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Beverly Levin for and with William Quan. Frances Quan (Beneficiary) in Propria Persona.

Ms. Quan asked for clarification as to what the provision with respect to her 6% remainder interst means and what would happen in the event that the Trustees predecease her. Ms. Levin addressed the issues raised in the Examiner's notes with regard to gifting of the asset, the gift exceeding a 1/2 percent interest, appointment of a Guardian Ad Litem for the unborn Children and who holds the 1% interest in the partnership. The Court granted the Petition for Instructions to Trustee and Approval of Gift to Grantor's Issue (subject to review of the order).

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Nuque.
